message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.2.3

Release v0.2.3 includes:

Fixes:
- fix(security): avoid static secret scanner false positives in source
- fix(init): require explicit consent for guard installation
- fix(content): handle nested array content in coerceContent/coerceRawContent
- docs(cli): add 'partial' to outcome command help text

Refactoring:
- refactor(core): optimize Map update pattern to reduce redundant lookups

Testing:
- Comprehensive test additions for info, validate, diary, examples modules
- E2E tests for audit, undo, diary, onboard, outcome, serve commands

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
